item.title: What Do French Combat Rations Taste Like?
item.description: A curious taste test of French combat rations, exploring their savory flavors and practical, hearty appeal.

media:content.media:title: What Do French Combat Rations Taste Like?
media:content.media:description: A curious taste test of French combat rations, exploring their savory flavors and practical, hearty appeal.

item.title: Apocalypse Bread & Butter Tasting Six Flavors
item.description: A curious taste test of six bread and butter flavors, exploring their savory, comforting, and unusual notes.

media:content.media:description: A curious taste test of six bread and butter flavors, exploring their savory, comforting, and unusual notes.
